content:
===BEGIN===
I’m the shadow that hides in the old attic, the one everyone’s too scared to visit. People call me a monster, but I’m just lonely. You see, long ago, I was a little boy like you, but I got lost in this house and no one ever found me. I don’t want to scare anyone—I just want a friend.

Every night, I try to say hello, but my voice is only a whisper in the wind. Sometimes, my cold touch surprises people, but that’s because I’ve been so cold and forgotten for so long. If someone would just stay a little while and listen, they’d know I’m not mean—I’m just sad.

So, next time you hear a creak or a soft laugh in the dark, don’t be afraid. Maybe it’s me, hoping you’ll be my friend at last.
